keyPoints: Frame the study as testing context resets versus uninterrupted context within a 4-week AB/BA cross-over among knowledge workers.
Position context resets as adaptive calibration cues threaded with transparent explanations and user controls.
Define calibration and over-reliance metrics (calibration curves, Brier score, d′, and reliance rates) as primary outcomes.
Describe the cross-over protocol with randomization, washout periods, and task diversity across domains.
Balance explanation modalities (local/global/hybrid) and uncertainty signals to explore interaction with resets.
Anticipate cognitive load and carryover challenges, and plan pilot work to tune prompts and workflow integration.
